name: VBWD for Enterprise
content_html:
For enterprise teams

The SaaS toolkit that adapts to you. Not the other way around.

Composable verticals, vendor-neutral payments, plugin-native architecture. Run one shop, one hotel booking engine, one medical intake — or all of them on a single codebase.

Request a consultation Browse solutions
3,500+

Plugin installs across the network

6

Vertical demos running on one platform

BSL-1.1

Self-hostable, source-available licence

Nine capabilities, built for enterprise

Flexible customisation

Every plugin is a standalone repo with its own CI. Build on top, fork, or replace — no vendor lock-in.

B2B & B2C pricing

Tiered plans, per-customer contracts, addon catalogues, token bundles. The subscription plugin handles all of it.

Multi-instance, one codebase

Six live demo subdomains today — vbwd.cc, shop, hotel, doctor, ghrm, saas — from the same images, different plugin configs.

Headless-ready API

Every surface exposes a JSON API before it exposes a Vue component. Swap the front-end without touching the backend.

Native integrations

Stripe, PayPal, YooKassa out of the box. Each is a plugin you can disable or replace with your own adapter in ~80 lines.

Modular extensions

Plugins live in individual GitHub repos under VBWD-platform. Install, update, and version them independently.

Responsive by default

Every theme ships mobile-first. The 6-colour × 2-width matrix covers 12 combinations before any custom CSS.

CMS inside

Pages, layouts, widgets, styles, menus, and a runtime default-style resolver — no external CMS to integrate.

Accelerator kits

Pre-built demo instances let you clone a vertical and go live in a day. See the accelerator page.

Four case studies on a single platform

Shop — multi-vendor storefront

Booking plugin disabled; shop + discount + stripe active. One catalogue, cart, checkout, coupons.

shop.vbwd.cc →

Hotel — room booking engine

Booking plugin active; shop and GHRM inactive. Live availability, instant confirmation.

hotel.vbwd.cc →

Doctor — clinic intake

Same booking plugin as hotel, different vertical framing. Shows composability.

doctor.vbwd.cc →

Software store — GitHub-backed catalogue

GHRM plugin + subscription for metered access. Sell repositories with automatic access provisioning.

ghrm.vbwd.cc →

Ready to evaluate?

Request a 30-minute walkthrough. No pricing slides.

Book a call
meta_title: VBWD for Enterprise — The SaaS toolkit that adapts to you
meta_description: Composable verticals, vendor-neutral payments, plugin-native architecture. Run your shop, hotel, clinic, or SaaS on a single codebase.
